2605.19999.title: LLM Benchmark Datasets Should Be Contamination-Resistant
2605.19999.paper_summary: Benchmark datasets are critical for reproducible, reliable, and discriminative evaluation of LLMs. However, recent studies reveal that many benchmark datasets are included in pretraining corpora, i.e., $\textit{contaminated}$, which diminishes their value as reliable measures of model generalization. In this paper, we argue that benchmark datasets should be $\textit{contamination-resistant}$, i.e., $\textit{unlearnable}$, but support $\textit{inference}$. To accomplish this, we first highlight the wide prevalence of benchmark dataset contamination and outline the properties of contamination-resistant datasets. Second, we highlight how the asymmetry between the inference and training pipelines in the Transformer architecture can be leveraged to support contamination-resistance. Third, we outline mathematical advancements to make these datasets interoperable across various LLM architectures. Based on the above, we call on the community to ensure the reliability of LLM benchmarking by: (i) advancing novel contamination-resistant methodologies, (ii) developing supporting methods and platforms, and (iii) adopting contamination-resistant benchmarks into existing evaluation pipelines.
2605.19999.paper_summary_zh: 基準數據集對於可重複、可靠和具區分性的 LLM 評估至關重要。<lb/>然而，近期研究顯示，許多基準數據集已包含在預訓練語料庫中，即 $\textit{受污染的}$，這降低了它們作為模型泛化可靠測量的價值。<lb/>在本文中，我們主張基準數據集應該是 $\textit{抗污染的}$，即 $\textit{不可學習的}$，但支持 $\textit{推理}$。<lb/>為了實現這一目標，我們首先強調基準數據集污染的廣泛存在，並概述抗污染數據集的特性。<lb/>其次，我們強調如何利用 Transformer 架構中推理和訓練管道之間的非對稱性來支持抗污染性。<lb/>第三，我們概述數學進展，以使這些數據集能夠在各種 LLM 架構中互操作。<lb/>基於上述內容，我們呼籲社群通過以下方式確保 LLM 基準測試的可靠性： (i) 推進新型抗污染方法， (ii) 開發支持方法和平台， (iii) 將抗污染基準納入現有評估管道。
2605.19999.author: Ali Al-Lawati et.al.
2605.19999.authors: Ali Al-Lawati, Jason Lucas, Dongwon Lee, Suhang Wang
